license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rpvd5n6
title: AFLP RedTaq protocol
author: Michal Ronikier

steps_raw.instruction: undetermined, water undetermined, T4 DNA Ligase buffer (10×) undetermined, BSA (1 mg/ml) undetermined, NaCl (0.5 M) undetermined, Adapter MseI (50 µM) undetermined, Adapter EcoRI (5 µM) undetermined, MseI (10 U/µl) undetermined, EcoRI (20 U/µl) undetermined, T4 DNA Ligase (5U/µl)
Incubate at 37ºC for 3 h and at 17 °C overnight.

Prepare the reaction mix: undetermined, water undetermined, RedTaq Buffer (10x) undetermined, dNTP (2.5 mM each) undetermined, Presel. primer Eco-A (10 µM) undetermined, Presel. primer Mse-C (10 µM) undetermined, Sigma RedTaq (1U/ µl)
Add 2 μl of the 10x diluted restriction-ligation product to 8 μl of the reaction mix (total volume 10 μl).
Run the PCR program: 72°C for 2 min 25 cycles of: 94°C for 1 s 56°C for 30 s 72°C for 120 s 60°C for 30 min hold at 4°C

Prepare reaction mix: undetermined, water undetermined, RedTaq Buffer (10x) undetermined, dNTP (2.5 mM each) undetermined, Sigma RedTaq (1U/ µl) undetermined, Sel. primer Mse-Cxx (5 µM) undetermined, Sel. primer Eco-Axx (1 µM)

Run the PCR program: 94°C for 2 min 10 cycles of: 94°C for 1 s 65°C for 30 s, with a ramp of -1°C per step (up to 56°C) 72°C for 120 s 22 cycles of: 94°C for 1 s 56°C for 30 s 72°C for 120 s 60°C for 30 min hold at 4°C
Proceed with Sephadex purification protocol and loading on ABI 3130.
Add 6 μl of DNA to 6 μl of the restriction-ligation mix.
Add 2 μl of the 10x diluted preselective PCR product to 8 μl of the reaction mix (total volume 10 μl).
